_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5 Ch.X (SL(2,Z), Euclidean algorithm) and Stern (1858) / Brocot (1861) (Stern-Brocot tree). -->
description: (4,6): gcd(4,6)=2, not 1. Not a primitive pair. Stern-Brocot tree only covers gcd=1 states.
